g.data-outlined-text: An agent interacts with an environment and learns from rewards, not provided labels.
π(a | s; θ) or a = π(s; θ)
Update θ so actions earn higher long-term reward.
Optional estimates: V(s; θ) or Q(s, a; θ)
Supervised: correct answer y is given. Reinforcement: reward r arrives after acting.
The learned model is often a policy: π(a | s; θ).
